title: elatostema sublaxum
intro: Elatostema sublaxum, also known as the creeping shield flower or creeping elatostema, is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting skin health. Elatostema sublaxum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
